# testlib

This directory contains a vendored copy of `testlib.h` from
https://github.com/MikeMirzayanov/testlib.

Version: 0.9.45

Version commit:

https://github.com/MikeMirzayanov/testlib/commit/937bf6da679e11ec7f0595301af3805c58ae2666

Vendored upstream commit:

```text
1e4e8a24c79c6bad3becbdb5a332ffc352b7d5dd
```

To update, replace `testlib.h` and `LICENSE` from the chosen upstream commit,
then rebuild the stresser runtime image.
